data.title: Key images from 2025 show global impact of major economic changes, thanks to our photographers and contributors.
data.description: Images taken by our photojournalists and others have documented the global impact of significant developments originating in Washington and other locations.

data.title: Bitcoin price rises following $24B options expiry, setting $100,000 target post Boxing Day, with options worth $23.7B.
data.description: After the options expiry on Boxing Day, Bitcoin is expected to reach an initial target of $100,000. The options expiry is set to be worth a record-breaking $23.7 billion.

data.title: PowerBank secures $4M in transaction with Solar Advocate Development, reinforcing growth model; $41M deal expands alliance and NY market position, with 16.87MW projects.
data.description: A recent transaction worth $41 million USD has demonstrated PowerBank's robust growth strategy. The company's seven-year strategic alliance has been expanded with the addition of three new community solar facilities. This move has further solidified PowerBank's position in the New York market, particularly with the 11th Solar Advocate Development Partnership Project. The total combined capacity of the new projects amounts to 16.87 MW, indicating a significant contribution to the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Anfield Energy announces $7M LIFE offering of common shares and concurrent $7M private placement of subscription receipts in Canada only.
data.description: This press release is meant for distribution solely in Canada, not for distribution to United States newswire services or dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Xali Gold concludes initial private placement raising $1.5M in funds.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate had dropped to 4.2% in the latest data release. The economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding economists' expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was revised up to 6.7%, showing strong economic recovery. Consumer spending also saw a notable increase of 2.5% compared to the previous quarter. The stock market responded positively to this news, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a new record high of 35,000 points. These numbers indicate a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery post-pandemic.

data.title: Canadian Solar appoints Colin Parkin as President and Dylan Marx as COO, with Parkin joining the board. Yan Zhuang steps down.
data.description: In Kitchener, Ontario on December 24, 2025, Canadian Solar Inc. shared that Colin Parkin has been appointed to the Board of Directors and promoted to President of the company. This change follows Yan Zhuang stepping down. Canadian Solar trades as NASDAQ: CSIQ.

data.title: Cloopen Group Holding Limited receives "Going Private" proposal from Mr. Changxun Sun on Dec 22, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Cloopen Group Holding Limited (OTC: RAASY) revealed that its Board of Directors had received a preliminary non-binding proposal letter on December 22, 2025 from Mr. Changxun Sun. The company, based in Beijing, made this announcement.

data.title: Education Cannot Wait program in Ukraine provides teacher training to help crisis-affected students; in Slavsko, educators gain skills.
data.description: A teacher training program backed by Education Cannot Wait and organized by Teach For Ukraine is assisting educators in acquiring necessary skills to support crisis-affected students in Ukraine. Held in SLAVSKO on Dec. 24, 2025, this program in the small town provides essential training to help teachers effectively assist students impacted by the crisis.

data.title: Sanofi to acquire Dynavax Technologies for $2.2 billion, at $15.50 per share, boosting adult immunization portfolio.
data.description: Sanofi has announced its acquisition of vaccine manufacturer Dynavax Technologies for $2.2 billion, equivalent to $15.50 per share. This acquisition will bolster Sanofi's offerings in the realm of adult immunizations. Following the news, Dynavax's stock experienced a significant surge in value.

data.title: Banco Itaú Chile appoints Gustavo Ortiz Ramírez as new independent director to replace Kevin Cowan Logan.
data.description: In Santiago, Chile, on December 24, 2025, Banco Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) made an announcement regarding a significant change in leadership. The Bank filed a Material Event Notice with the Chilean Commission for the Financial Market after an extraordinary meeting on December 23. Mr. Gustavo Ortiz Ramírez was appointed as the new independent director, succeeding Mr. Kevin Cowan Logan. This appointment is effective from January 1, 2026, and Mr. Ramírez will serve in this role until the upcoming Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, where the Bank's Board of Directors will undergo renewal and re-election.

data.title: FP Markets reached a milestone of 20 years in transforming trading, focusing on innovation and growth.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, FP Markets, a leading global multi-asset broker, celebrated its 20th anniversary by highlighting its dedication to innovation, cutting-edge technology, and prioritizing the needs of traders. Over the past two decades, FP Markets has been committed to "Transforming Trading" and has established a strong reputation in the industry for its performance-driven approach. Established in (2005/2000/etc.), the company has continued to grow and expand its services, garnering a significant number of loyal clients worldwide.
